warnings: 321 nodes use compound file: prefix (e.g., file:handler:, file:mig-, file:symbol:const:) instead of dedicated semantic prefixes — these originate from unknown node types that were mapped to file: during assembly
345 nodes (47%) missing 'name' field — mostly file-type nodes without derived human-readable names
525 nodes (71%) missing 'summary' field — majority of nodes lack descriptions
546 nodes (74%) missing 'tags' field — majority of nodes lack categorization tags
567 edges (68%) missing 'weight' property — all recovered import-map edges lack weights
469 edges (56%) missing 'label' property — many edges lack human-readable labels

Edge count discrepancy: merge report claims 717 edges, actual JSON has 833 (116 from importMap recovery not reflected in report)
suggestedActions: Re-run the understand pipeline with proper semantic prefixes (handler:, migration:, interface:, constant:, variable:, script:, etc.) instead of folding unknown types under file:
Add name derivation logic for file-type nodes to generate human-readable names from file paths
Populate summary and tags fields for all nodes — currently ~70%+ are missing these metadata fields
Add default weight values (e.g., 0.7) and label derivation for recovered import-map edges
Fix the 4 type/ID-prefix mismatches by correcting either the node type or the ID prefix
Update the merge script to report the final edge count after importMap recovery instead of the pre-recovery count
